description: x402 paying-fetch client for AI agents. Spending caps, approval, receipts. Non-custodial.
name: io.github.forum-labs/payfetch

environmentVariables.description: 0x-hex EVM private key for a DEDICATED low-balance wallet. Set exactly ONE signer source.
environmentVariables.name: PAYFETCH_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Path to a chmod-600 file holding a 0x-hex key (signer alt).
environmentVariables.name: PAYFETCH_KEY_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Coinbase CDP server-wallet key id (YOUR account).
environmentVariables.name: PAYFETCH_CDP_API_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: Any value -> receipts test:true, Base mainnet refused (Sepolia only).
environmentVariables.name: PAYFETCH_TEST_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to grant approval authority (never with a queue-capable mode).
environmentVariables.name: PAYFETCH_APPROVER

environmentVariables.description: Optional via= attribution slug sent on guard calls only.
environmentVariables.name: PAYFETCH_VIA
